# Shivansh Fulper — Full Context

> AI engineer and startup founder. CTO at OneSync, Co-Founder of EcoFresh Greensync. Building cognitive performance wearables and decentralized waste-to-value infrastructure.

## Identity

Name: Shivansh Fulper
Location: Nagpur, India
Education: B.Tech '26, IIITDM Jabalpur (Smart Manufacturing)
Current Roles: CTO & Co-Founder @ OneSync, AI Engineer @ Atlan
Email: piyushfulper3210@gmail.com

## Professional Background

Shivansh builds AI systems at the infrastructure level — not wrappers, not demos, real pipelines that process data at scale and make decisions autonomously.

As CTO of OneSync, he is building the intelligence layer that turns wearable biosignals into cognitive readiness scores. He also co-founded EcoFresh Greensync — a decentralized waste-to-value infrastructure company with 3 IP discoveries and recognition at the Hult Prize.

At Atlan, he builds AI-native developer agents. At Soket AI Labs, he built multilingual dataset pipelines for Indic LLM training.

He thinks in systems, ships fast, and would rather fail at 20 than wait until he's "qualified."

## Ventures (Detailed)

### OneSync — Cognitive Performance Platform
- Role: Co-Founder & CTO
- Timeline: 2026 — Present
- Website: https://onesync-website-zs1p.vercel.app/
- Stack: AI/ML, Biosignal Processing, Edge Computing, React, TypeScript

OneBand is a wristband that reads multiple biosignals — heart rhythm variability, galvanic skin response, motion patterns, muscle tension — and cross-references them to produce a cognitive readiness index.

The system stays quiet when it's not confident. In environments where a bad call has real consequences, showing nothing is better than a false green light.

Built for institutions: training academies, defense units, elite sports teams. The AI layer builds a personal digital twin — learning individual baselines so that "normal" for one person isn't confused with "stressed" for another.

Team of 4 (CEO, CTO, COO, CPO) with backgrounds spanning biosensing, AI systems, manufacturing, and product hardware.

### EcoFresh Greensync — Waste-to-Value Infrastructure
- Role: Co-Founder
- Timeline: Nov 2025 — Present
- Website: https://www.ecofreshgreensync.com/
- Stack: AI/ML, Polymer Modeling, Bio-processing, Catalytic Systems

Modular Eco-Converter units that accept mixed municipal solid waste as-is and process it through staged biological and catalytic pathways. No dependency on perfect segregation.

First high-value output: PHA-class biodegradable polymers, with secondary streams like bio-fertilizer and eco-composites.

Achievements:
- Registered as EcoFresh Greensync LLP (MSME Micro Enterprise)
- Incubated at IIITDM Jabalpur under Institution's Innovation Council (Ministry of Education)
- 16th among 2,500+ teams at Hult Prize, IIT Bombay
- National recognition from Ministry of Education
- 3 IP discoveries with patent filing procedures documented

## Work Experience

### Atlan — AI Engineer Intern (2026)
Building AI-native SDLC agents — autonomous debugging, GraphRAG retrieval, and long-term agent memory systems for developer workflows.

### Soket AI Labs — MTS Intern (2025)
Built multilingual dataset pipelines for Indic LLM training (Project Eka). Deduplication, quality filtering, and language alignment at scale. Collaboration with IIT Gandhinagar.

### OpenFn (Code for GovTech) — AI Engineer Intern (2024)
NLP-to-workflow pipeline for government-tech data integrations. Selected under the Code for GovTech national open-source program.

## Technical Skills

AI & ML Systems: Large Language Models, RAG & GraphRAG, Agentic Systems, Biosignal Processing, NER & NLP Pipelines, Dataset Curation, Memory-Augmented AI

Engineering: Python, TypeScript, Next.js, React, Node.js, MongoDB, Redis

Infrastructure: Distributed Systems, Data Pipeline Design, Edge Computing, API Architecture, Docker

Tools: Git, Linux, Figma, PyTorch, TensorFlow

Currently Exploring: MoE Architectures, AI-Native Development Environments, Cognitive Computing
